message:
refactor(journal): extract scan_committed_tail_transaction helper and stage alloc_block head via parameter

- Extract the descriptor-header parsing and tag-based head advancement
  logic from Jbd2Writer::new into a scan_committed_tail_transaction()
  helper, reducing the constructor's complexity and making the committed-
  transaction scan reusable
- Change alloc_block() to take a mutable head reference parameter instead
  of mutating self.head directly, allowing commit_transaction() to stage
  all block allocations through a local staged_head and only persist to
  self.head after the commit block is successfully written — this ensures
  a failed mid-transaction write does not leave the journal head in an
  inconsistent partially-advanced state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
